_comment: Rename to evt-….json OR public slug from luma.com/XXXX (e.g. or9xabm6.json). Optional lumaApiId inside file for alternate filename. All content fields optional.
title: NYC Alt Cloud Meetup (May 2026)
description:
**May 13th** - Theme: Go Big or Go Small, We Got Ya!

*   5:00 - Doors open, drinks mingling
    *   6:00 - Tony from CoreWeave - Big Iron, Tiny Red Fish
    *   6:30 - Rob from Neurometrics: Small but Mighty, Where SLM’s Shine
*   7:00 - Drinks and Mingling
